Petition To Approve Compromise
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Rebecca L. Byrne, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Ernesto Vasquez, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Andrew Lara Vasquez, present via CourtCall.

Petitioner sworn and examined.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:

Total Settlement: $166,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $53,291.50 payable to Law Firm of Mitchell Law Group and Law Office of Edward J. Nevin.
Costs: $70,294.98
A net balance of $42,913.52 to be deposited into a special needs trust tbd.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor's Compromise into a special needs trust.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 22, 2017, at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into special needs trust. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
